# Feature: Playwright → Flows first-class (generic)

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-07-17 — do not edit manually unless correcting intent -->

## Intent
Reliable path from Playwright import to ≥1 ordered flow in `flows.json` for any app with Playwright traces/tests; document generic steps; strengthen in-repo `integrations/hr-workflows` and/or `examples/react-vite` so verify proves it. Generic platform — no browo hardcodes.

## Preconditions
- Monorepo install (`pnpm install`) and built CLI packages
- In-repo fixture at `integrations/hr-workflows/fixtures/playwright-report.json` (and example fixture)

## Happy Path
- [ ] `autoguide scan --playwright-import <report.json>` (or `scan.playwrightImportPath`) on in-repo fixture writes ≥1 flow with ordered steps to `flows.json`
- [ ] Documented CLI path in README + INTEGRATION.md + hr-workflows/example READMEs
- [ ] `autoguide doctor` emits German `FLOW_SEEDING_HINT` when no ordered flows exist
- [ ] Integration/unit tests prove import path; `pnpm run verify` green
- [ ] No browo-specific hardcodes in production code

## Edge Cases
- [ ] Playwright report path configured but file missing → German warning, scan still ok
- [ ] flows.json present but all flows have 0 steps → same seeding hint as empty
- [ ] Source-only scan without import → hint when flows empty

## Regression
- [ ] Existing `hr-workflows.integration.test.ts` still proves ≥3 ordered flows
- [ ] `flowSeedingWarning` unit tests still pass

## Assumptions
- Playwright JSON report format (suites/specs/tests/results/steps) remains the supported import shape
- browo-hr remains optional dogfood only

## Implementation Notes
- `packages/cli/src/lib/flow-seeding-hint.ts` — ordered-flow helpers + DE hint (hr-workflows + react-vite refs)
- `packages/cli/src/commands/doctor.ts` — hint when zero ordered flows (incl. empty steps)
- `packages/cli/src/commands/scan.ts` — DE warning if Playwright path missing; seeding uses ordered count
- `packages/cli/src/playwright-import.integration.test.ts` — explicit `--playwright-import` + missing path + doctor empty-steps
- Docs: README, INTEGRATION.md, examples/react-vite README + fixture + config `playwrightImportPath`
